gender: How do you describe your gender?
region: Which part of the world do you live in?
roots: Where did you grow up, or where do you feel most “from”?
skin_tone: How would you describe your skin tone?
city_size: What size is the place where you live?
siblings: How many siblings do you have?
family_vibe: What was your family like when you were growing up?
longest_relationship: About how long was your longest relationship?
partner_proximity: If you have a partner, how close do you live to each other?
chaos_tolerance: How well do you handle a busy or stressful life?
screen_time: About how many hours a day do you spend on screens (phone, TV, computer)?
routine: How regular is your daily routine?
coffee_habit: How much coffee or other caffeine do you drink?
entertainment: What do you usually do for fun or to relax? (Pick all that apply)
gaming_intensity: Do you play video games or games on your phone? How often?
pets_home: Do you have pets at home?
pet_energy: How would you describe the way you care for your pets?
self_care_frequency: How often do you take time just for yourself?
self_care_lane: What kind of self-care helps you most? (Pick all that apply)
cooking_at_home: How often do you cook meals at home?
hobby_count: How many hobbies or regular pastimes do you have?
hobby_type: Which best describes your main hobby?
sport_kind: Do you play sports or exercise? What kind fits best?
movies_you_like: What kinds of movies do you enjoy? (Pick all that apply)
tv_you_like: What kinds of TV programmes do you enjoy? (Pick all that apply)
books_you_like: What kinds of books do you enjoy? (Pick all that apply)
instrument_play: Do you play a musical instrument?
maker_crafts: Do you make or fix things with your hands (woodwork, sewing, crafts, repairs)?
collecting_hobby: Do you collect anything as a serious hobby?
weekend_projects: How do you usually spend your weekends?
personality_type: Would you say you lean more toward introvert or extrovert?
decision_style: How do you usually make big decisions?
social_battery: How long can you be with people before you need quiet time?
risk_tolerance: How comfortable are you taking risks?
love_language: What makes you feel cared for in a relationship? (Pick all that apply)
dating_types: What kinds of people are you drawn to when dating? (Pick all that apply)
the_ick: What puts you off someone quickly when you are dating?
conflict_style: When you disagree with someone, what do you usually do?
punctuality: Are you usually on time for plans?
education_level: What is the highest level of education you completed?
education_field: What subject or field did you mainly study or work in? (Pick all that apply)
school_vibe: How did you feel about school when you were a student?
still_learning: Do you still take classes or study for pleasure?
edu_student_debt: Do you have student loans or other education-related debt?
languages_count: How many languages do you speak comfortably?
study_abroad: Did you ever study or live abroad for school or university?
mentor_or_teach: Do you formally mentor, coach, or teach others?
edu_privilege: Growing up, how easy was it for you to get a good education?
professional_license: Do you work in a field that requires a professional license?
employment: What best describes your work situation right now?
income: How would you describe your household income lately?
boss_energy: Which best describes your role at work?
commute_soul: How do you get to work—or do you mostly work from home?
work_years_band: How many years in total have you worked for pay?
work_industry: What industry do you work in?
job_stress: How stressful is a typical work week for you?
work_hours_band: How many hours do you usually work in a week?
career_change: Have you ever changed careers in a major way?
job_security_feeling: How secure does your job feel right now?
build: How would you describe your build?
face_shape: What is the rough shape of your face?
hair: How would you describe your hair?
hairdresser_interval: How often do you get a haircut or professional trim?
activity: How much do you move around on a typical day?
sleep: How many hours do you usually sleep at night?
sleep_pattern: How would you describe your sleep pattern?
chronotype: Are you more of a morning person or a night person?
bra_cup: Women only: approximate bra cup size (optional)
plastic_surgery: Have you ever had cosmetic or plastic surgery?
plastic_detail: If yes, which area was treated?
alcohol: How often do you drink alcohol?
smoking: Do you smoke cigarettes or use a vape?
substances_other: Aside from alcohol, do you use recreational drugs or non-prescribed medicines?
caffeine_daily: How many caffeinated drinks do you have on a typical day?
sleep_quality_recent: How has your sleep quality been lately?
news_consumption: How much news do you follow?
gambling_skin: Do you gamble or buy lottery tickets?
sugar_drinks: How often do you drink sugary soft drinks?
substance_peer_pressure: Do people in your social circle pressure you about drinking or drugs?
poop_frequency: Bowel habits: about how often do you have a bowel movement?
pee_frequency: About how many times a day do you pass urine?
sick_per_year: In a typical year, how often do you get sick?
broken_bone: Have you ever broken a bone?
accident: Have you ever had a serious accident or had to go to hospital for an emergency?
dental_visit: How often do you see a dentist for a check-up?
vision_correction: Do you need glasses or contact lenses?
allergies_level: Do you have allergies? How severe are they?
physical_checkup: When did you last have a routine check-up with a doctor?
holidays_per_year: How many holidays or trips do you take in a typical year?
countries_visited: About how many countries have you visited in your life?
travel_style: What kind of traveller are you?
solo_travel: Do you prefer to travel alone or with other people?
flight_anxiety: How do you feel about flying?
travel_budget: How comfortable is your budget for travel?
international_last_year: How many international trips have you taken in the last 12 months?
dream_destination_type: If you could take one dream trip, what would it look like?
travel_barrier: What mainly stops you from travelling more?
mental_health_landscape: Mental health: which statement fits you best?
mental_health_day_to_day: How much does mental health affect your daily life right now?
therapy_status: Have you ever had therapy or counselling?
psychiatric_meds: Are you taking prescribed medication for mental health?
neuro_self_id: Do you identify as neurodivergent (for example ADHD or autism)? This is optional.
meditation_practice: Do you meditate or do breathing exercises?
journaling_habit: Do you keep a diary or write notes to yourself?
stress_first_coping: When you feel stressed, what do you usually do first?
social_media_mood_effect: Does social media affect your mood?
sleep_mental_link: For you, are sleep problems and mood problems connected?
kink_fetish_radar: Sexual interests and fantasies (private; adults only)
sex_episodes_last_year: In the last year, about how often were you sexually intimate with a partner?
sex_ideal_frequency: Ideally, how often would you want intimacy with a partner per month?
lifetime_partners_band: Over your lifetime, roughly how many sexual partners have you had?
talking_desires_comfort: How easy is it for you to say what you want when you are intimate?
body_image_intimacy: During intimacy, how do you feel about your body?
aftercare_importance: How important is cuddling or talking afterward?
libido_vs_life_stress: Has stress affected your sex drive lately?
comfort_with_toys: How do you feel about sexual aids or toys?
criminal_record: Have you ever had legal trouble or a criminal record?
cheated_partner: Have you ever been unfaithful in a relationship?
been_cheated: Have you ever been cheated on?
major_money_trouble: Have you ever been bankrupt or in serious debt?
fired_or_laid_off: Have you ever been fired or laid off from a job?
estrangement_family: Are you estranged from anyone in your close family?
substance_family_history: When you were growing up, did anyone in your home have alcohol or drug problems?
therapy_family_of_origin: Has therapy ever focused on your childhood or family?
biggest_regret_category: If you had to pick one kind of regret, what would it be?
truth_over_easy_lie: Recently, have you told a difficult truth that upset someone?
